subcodes.first_line: O nightingales of the divine rose-garden and O birds of the celestial garden of eternity! The morn of divine glad-tidings hath dawned from the horizon of the soul [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بلبلان گلزار احدیه و ای طایران گلستان صمدیه صبح بشارت الهی از افق جان
subcodes.subjects: @love of God, @the divine emanation; the all-pervading bounty of God, @call to action, @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life, @spiritual transformation, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities
